author: lOrm
content: #590 closed. Added StopConditionsConfig in src/config/stop_conditions.rs with max_total_input_tokens, max_total_output_tokens, max_total_tokens caps + is_met() predicate returning typed StopReason (InputTokenBudget|OutputTokenBudget|TotalTokenBudget). TokenTotals helper saturates on overflow. Existing cost_tracked event at src/session/pricing.rs:588 covers spend observability. Remaining gap: turn-loop integration in pipeline.rs that accumulates per-turn deltas and calls is_met() at turn end. Config schema + predicate + 7 unit tests now in place.
